hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
if [ "$file_path" != """ ]; then
  echo "[Hook] Creating markdown: $file_path"
fi

#!/bin/bash
echo "[Hook] Checking commit message format..."
if ! echo "$command" | grep -qE "^git commit.*-m \".+\".+"; then
  echo "[Hook] ⚠️  Use: git commit -m 'title' -m 'body'"
fi

#!/bin/bash
if [ "$file_path" != """ ]; then
  echo "[Hook] Created: $file_path ($(wc -l < "$file_path") lines)"
fi
